LoginPage.title: Login to Your Account
LoginPage.description: Please enter your email and password to login.

SignupPage.description: Please fill in the form to create an account.

AccountPage.title: Your Account
AccountPage.description: Manage your account information and settings.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.description: At Oasezorg, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our CRM application.
PrivacyPolicyPage.informationWeCollectDescription: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and usage data when you interact with our application. We use this information to provide and improve our services.
PrivacyPolicyPage.howWeUseInformationDescription: We use your information to personalize your experience, communicate with you, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
PrivacyPolicyPage.dataSecurityDescription: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
PrivacyPolicyPage.yourChoicesDescription: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can also opt-out of receiving promotional communications from us.
PrivacyPolicyPage.contactUsDescription: If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy practices, please contact us.
